mapper.update: update TRANSFERRELATION set counts = #{counts}, status = #{status}, updatetime = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(6) where routeid = #{routeId}
update TRANSFERRELATION set counts = counts + #{counts}, status = (case when counts = 0 then '1' else '2' end), updatetime = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(6) where routeid = #{routeId} and status in ('1','2')
